# Sword n' Wool: Bedwars Edition

A lightweight PvP resource pack designed for Bedwars Players.

## Changed Textures:

- Wool - Simplified, outlined
- Swords - Short Swords
- (Armor)

## Tool used:
This Texture Pack was created using my mod **[Live Texture Editor](https://modrinth.com/mod/livetextureeditor)**
